action_set_definitions.name: get_system_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time operational data including segment pressures, current pump throttle levels, pump statuses, valve states, and active system alerts.

action_set_definitions.name: get_pipeline_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies the relationship of valves to a specific pipeline segment, categorizing them as Upstream, Downstream, or Bypass.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_pump_throttle
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the speed/output of a pump by a specific relative percentage. Positive values increase throttle; negative values decrease it.

pump_id.description: The ID of the pump to adjust.

relative_change.description: The percentage change to apply (e.g., -5.0 for a 5% reduction, -0.5 for a fine-tuned 0.5% reduction).

action_set_definitions.name: set_valve_position
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the physical state of a valve to 'Open' or 'Closed' to control the flow path.

state_description.segment_pressures: Mapping of pipeline segment IDs to their current pressure in PSI
state_description.valve_positions: Mapping of valve IDs to their status ('Open' or 'Closed')
state_description.pump_status: Mapping of pump IDs to their current status ('Running', 'Idle', 'Fault')
state_description.active_alerts: List of active system warning strings
